# Polymarket Copier v2

**Updated:** 6/5/2026, 10:22 UTC
**Mode:** 📄 PAPER TRADING
**Pilot:** RN1 + kch123 live; swisstony and GamblingIsAllYouNeed paused

## Active Wallets Being Tracked
- #3 **kch123** — $12.1M PnL
- #5 **RN1** — $8.0M PnL
- #8 **swisstony** — $7.2M PnL
- #15 **GamblingIsAllYouNeed** — $4.8M PnL

## Core Allowlist
- #5 **RN1** — 117 res | 61.5% WR | €194.67
- #3 **kch123** — 112 res | 68.8% WR | €99.19

## Scout Discovery Pool
- #8 **swisstony** — 71 res | 53.5% WR | €-39.20
- #15 **GamblingIsAllYouNeed** — 157 res | 28.7% WR | €-301.50

## Trade Stats
- Total logged: 731
- Open: 262
- Resolved: 469
- Won: 237 (51% win rate)
- Lost: 232
- Net paper P&L: €-72.36
- Avg resolved P&L: €-0.15

## This Pass
- Newly resolved: 4 closed scout trade(s)
- Net change: €-17.76

## Open Markets Remaining
- 262 open trades across 114 markets
